content.en:
"Wumu Ancient Stone!"

"Dimensional Gravel!"

"There is also a self-created three-realm multi-dimensional mastery - Sand and Gravel Robbery!"

"That's what I've learned this time!"

After Ye Tian came out, he immediately went to refine the Wumu Ancient Stone, and used the Wumu Ancient Stone to impact the second layer of the Wumu body.

As for the matter of entering the inheritance land of the Wumu Realm Lord again, it can't be too frequent, otherwise it will be too fake.

Ye Tian swallowed the ancient stone of the black mother into the extradimensional realm in his body, and absorbed its energy to refine his own black mother body.

In addition, he also prepared some accumulated Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Treasure Essence, and swallowed it in one bite to impact the second realm of the Black Mother's body.

Rumble!!!!

The previously indestructible bottleneck was now like a piece of paper, easily torn apart by the energy of the Wumu Ancient Stone.

Suddenly, the body of the black mother began to transform.

In a flash.

His body began to transform, his physical fitness began to skyrocket, and his breath became stronger and stronger.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai truly completed the transformation, and the body of the black mother reached the realm of the second layer of the first entry.

However, at this time, there was a problem, that is, the second layer of the Wumu body plus the second layer of the Ka Ye wisdom body, and the second layer of the two innate multidimensional Dao bodies was very repulsive.

Even if he had cultivated the first layer of the Three Wu Secret Method to the limit of the first layer of Dacheng, he could only barely suppress the rejection, and he could not exert the power of the second layer of the Wu Mu Body and the Ka Ye Wisdom Body.

"You have to practice to the second level of the Three Black Secret Method!"

The first layer of the Sanwu Secret Method is just to lay the foundation, and the second layer is the real transformation.

If you have practiced the second layer of the Three Black Secret Method, you can completely exert the power of the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies.

However, he does not have the second layer of the Three Black Secret Method now.

At the beginning, the second test of the Wumu True Diagram in the inheritance land of the Lord of the Wumu Realm only gave him the first layer of the Three Wu Secret Method.

Of course, among the rewards of the inheritance land of the lord of the Wu Mu Realm, there is the second layer of the Three Black Secret Method, but it can only be chosen after the second test is successful.

Before.

Ye Tian was still able to control the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, so he was not in a hurry to cultivate the second layer of the Three Black Secret Method, so he had no choice.

"I have to go in again and learn the second layer of the Sanwu Secret Method!"

Wow!

Ye Tian once again sent a third realm replica body to enter the land of the Lord of the Black Mother Realm in another identity, and this time he changed the channel and entered the land of the Lord of the Black Mother Realm again.

He can still enter the dimensional gravel, but it is not too challenging and he can't get more benefits!

For example, if he didn't enter the dimensional gravel at the beginning, and went to the Wumu True Map, wouldn't he be able to learn the multi-dimensional mastery?

So, he entered the third safe extradimensional channel.

Wow!

Ye Tian passed through the extradimensional passage and came to another area of the inheritance land of the Lord of the Wumu Realm.

Here, he saw a strange stone shard, the stone flake was full of endless lines, and it did not seem to be in this dimension, but it seemed to encompass many dimensions.

Ye Tian looked at this strange stone tablet, revealing a look of doubt, but he still used his soul will to probe into it as before.

However.

"Ahh

Ye Tian groaned in pain, his soul will was annihilated by a powerful dimensional force, and the pain contained in it was something he had never encountered in countless years.

Of course, the pain is only for a moment, and then it's fine.

"That part of the soul will has been worn out, what is the situation?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

However, his soul will was only worn out when he went deep into the depths of this stone flake, and if he didn't go deeper, it shouldn't be a big problem.

He then leaned into the stone again, but this time cautiously and did not go deeper.

After a while, he had a rough understanding of what the stone flakes were for.

"Temper the soul will, when fighting against the power of the stone chips, the soul will be tempered, but the deepest power is too terrifying to resist now. "

At the same time, trials have arisen.

The seventh dimension?

Ye Tian was puzzled, what is this.

But after a little deduction, it is clear that this should be a level of soul will.

He searched and found an area inside the stone shard where he could test the will of the soul, and he could detect the level of the soul's will.

Soon.

The level of the soul's will has been detected.

Fifth Dimension

Ye Tian didn't know what the gap between the fifth dimension and the seventh dimension was, but it was obvious that he couldn't pass the first test at the moment.

"The potential of this third realm that I have copied is not too high, if it is my own soul will, I may be able to reach the sixth dimension!" Ye Tian guessed.

So in the following days, he began to refine his soul will.

And just like that, time passed slowly.

In the blink of an eye, more than two hundred extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian found that the Tricky Wood Red Dragon had come out, and the aura on the other party's body had skyrocketed a lot.

Swish!

Ye Tian appeared in the Tricky Wood Red Dragon and congratulated: "Tricky Wood Red Dragon, congratulations on completing the test, you should have obtained the Wumu True Liquid, right?"

Tricky Wood Red Dragon nodded: "Well, I was lucky enough to practice the first layer of the black mother's body, but it also exhausted all my healing things, if I can't practice again, I will have to come out!"

Moreover, in order to cultivate the body of the Black Mother, he still injured the foundation, but now that he has obtained the True Liquid of the Black Mother, he can reshape the superdimensional bloodline, and it will not affect his breakthrough to the Fourth Realm Hall.

Suddenly.

Tricky Wood Red Dragon looked at Ye Tian with some surprise, "Ye Tian, you have already broken through to the fourth realm???"

How many years have passed, and Ye Tian has completed a breakthrough?

What a wickedness this is!

"Well, it's also a fluke breakthrough!" Ye Tian was very modest.

After chatting for a while, Weimu Chilong said: "Ye Tian, after I am ready to break through to the fourth realm, I will leave here and return to the clan (Qian Zhao), with the cultivation of the fourth realm and the attainment of the first layer of the body of the black mother, I am very sure that I will return to the clan." "

Seeing that the Tricky Wood Red Dragon was leaving, Ye Tian didn't leave him, but asked: "Tricky Wood Red Dragon, do you know the division of the soul will, I have read a record, what are the dimensions?"

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon nodded slightly, "I do know the division of the soul will, whether it is a superdimensional creature or a cultivator who cultivates the extradimensional realm in the body, there is no need to care about the level of the soul will before the fifth realm, because whether to break through or not has little to do with the soul will." However, if you want to break through to the fifth realm, unless other conditions are met, you have to raise your soul will to the ninth dimension. The reason why many of the Fourth Realms could not be broken through was that the Soul Will did not reach the Ninth Dimension. Even, the Fourth Realm on the other side of the 500th Territory didn't know this secret at all, and if it weren't for the inheritance in my clan, and I happened to know about it, otherwise I wouldn't know this secret. "。
